query: Walk every branch and boundary in this function and list only the edge cases that aren't handled.
Do an exhaustive edge-case analysis of this diff — enumerate every unguarded path.
Trace all the boundary conditions in this code and tell me which ones lack a guard.
Hunt for unhandled edge cases in this function and give me the missing-handling list as JSON.
Give me a cynical, skeptical critique of this design doc — what's missing or sloppy?
Run the full code review workflow on my branch and triage findings into patch and defer buckets.
Audit whether this security gate's green result actually proves zero egress.
